name: flow-acceptance-harness
description: Executable simulation oracle for schema-therapy artifact 10 (specs/10-flow-acceptance/<persona>-<job>.feature). Pins @cucumber/gherkin (the format's own reference parser + pickle compiler — the parse-and-instantiate engine oracle) and its @cucumber/messages peer, per references/simulation.md §1. The 06/08/09 readers are hand-rolled, zero-dependency (copied PATTERNs), so the Gherkin parser is the only installed dep.
